summary: Excellent recording of a hot show highlighted by an unforgettable Terrapin Station performance
review: The reviewer raves about the energy of this concert, calling it a "hot show" and noting that the Terrapin Station rendition was possibly the best they've ever witnessed. The recording is praised as solid and worth getting, with no technical complaints mentioned.

ai_rating.rationale: A single five‑star review emphasizes a stellar performance (especially Terrapin) and a good recording, leading to a high rating despite limited data.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer describes the recording as "Good Recording" with no noted flaws; no specific details on soundboard vs. audience.

show_quality.setlist_flow: The concert is described as a high‑energy, "hot" show with Terrapin Station standing out as the marquee moment.
